paths.name: Plain-English on-ramp
paths.tagline: Never touched AI? From “what is an agent?” to running your business with it — no jargon, no code.

paths.name: AI for your business
paths.tagline: AI doing real work in your business — then master the platform that runs it end to end.

paths.name: Business leader, certified
paths.tagline: Run your business with AI, then prove it with Google Cloud’s Generative AI Leader credential.

paths.name: Governance & privacy
paths.tagline: Govern AI across its lifecycle — AIGP first, then the security ground truth underneath the policies.

paths.name: Secure AI engineering
paths.tagline: Defend LLM apps and agents, then take the secure-SDLC credential that proves it at scale.

paths.name: Claude architect
paths.tagline: The flagship builder’s route — Anthropic’s CCA-F, then GitHub’s Copilot credential alongside it.
